name: Honey and Lemon Balm Tea Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream the butter and honey.
2. Add eggs and beat well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients, then the milk, flavoring, and lemon balm.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes at 375°F.
